name: quant-research
description: Research-state protocols for algorithmic trading and quantitative finance research. Bundles `quant-research` for choosing R&D vs Pure Research, decomposing technologies into small capabilities, managing Pure Research as slow state updates rather than fast conclusions, analyzing failed and ambiguous trials, pruning hypotheses instead of accumulating them, and reserving heavy review for supported-claim promotion / external sharing / deployment / line closure. Also bundles `experiment-review` for independent claim-warrant review before supported conclusions.
